results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026 Global Economy Tested Again
10 Charts To Address Concerns On 2026 Geopolitical Conflict
Stock Market Outlook 2026: Political Risks Loom | Morgan Stanley
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook and Reshapes Policy Priorities

summary: Middle East conflict driving energy price spike (~19% increase). IMF projects global growth at 3.1% with inflation at 4.4%. Strait of Hormuz closure risk. US-Venezuela tensions, Iran civil unrest, NATO-Greenland posture. Today Iran shared peace proposal, helping markets recover early losses.
